tasks.label: Keil: Build 2023H
args: $candidates=@('C:/Keil_v5/UV4/UV4.exe','C:/Keil_v5/UV4/UV4.exe','D:/Keil_v5/UV4/UV4.exe','D:/Keil/UV4/UV4.exe'); $uv4=$candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $uv4) { Write-Error '没有找到 UV4.exe，请安装 Keil MDK 或修改 .vscode/tasks.json 里的路径。'; exit 1 }; & $uv4 -b 'MDK-ARM/2023H.uvprojx' -j0 -o 'MDK-ARM/build.log'

tasks.label: Keil: Rebuild 2023H
args: $candidates=@('C:/Keil_v5/UV4/UV4.exe','C:/Keil_v5/UV4/UV4.exe','D:/Keil_v5/UV4/UV4.exe','D:/Keil/UV4/UV4.exe'); $uv4=$candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $uv4) { Write-Error '没有找到 UV4.exe，请安装 Keil MDK 或修改 .vscode/tasks.json 里的路径。'; exit 1 }; & $uv4 -r 'MDK-ARM/2023H.uvprojx' -j0 -o 'MDK-ARM/rebuild.log'
